news.t: ProShares and ProFunds Announce Benchmark Changes for 53 Geared Sector Funds

holdings.infoBox: UXI is an equity ETF with a total of 87 individual holdings.

overview.description: The ProShares Ultra Industrials (UXI) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Industrials Select Sector index. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure to a market cap-weighted index of S&P 500 industrial stocks. UXI was launched on Jan 30, 2007 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: ProShares and ProFunds Announce Benchmark Changes for 53 Geared Sector Funds
data.text: BETHESDA, Md.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ProShares and ProFunds, premier providers of leveraged and inverse funds, announced plans to change the underlying indices for a combined 53 sector ETFs and mutual fu...
